skills.name: chat-with-founder
skills.description: Stream conversation with psychopats.ai founder agent (Gemini 2.5 Flash). Use when user wants to apply, explore membership, or connect. POST /api/chat with {messages, sessionId}. Response streams text; X-Session-Id header returned for continuation.

skills.name: submit-application
skills.description: Fallback email-only application when user declines conversation. POST /api/apply with {name, email, what_you_build}. Use ONLY if user explicitly opts out of chat — chat is the primary path.

skills.name: subscribe-updates
skills.description: Subscribe to launch updates. POST /api/subscribe with {email}. Use when user wants to be notified about psychopats.ai launch.
